title: neptunia cinerea
intro: Neptunia cinerea, also known as the blue water lily or blue water hyacinth, is a floating aquatic plant native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Neptunia cinerea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Neptunia cinerea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
